text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Spring Fan Fest. Everyone attending
is enjoying the various events being held.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! There's so many people. Oh, if it isn't
Scarlet.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Vodka?! Did you come to watch the Tiara tour
talk show as well?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: The Tiara tour talk show?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...I guess not. Sigh... It's about to start, so shut up and watch if you're going to stay. I'm taking this seriously, so don't disturb me.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Wha—?! Then you make sure not to bother me either!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Braids
text_block_list.text:
This way, this way! We'll be able to see her talk
from over here!

text_block_list.name: Chestnut-haired Umamusume's Fan
text_block_list.text: ...Tch. Why is she always at the same events?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Everyone, we'd like to express our dearest thanks
to you all for coming to see our talk show today.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Your support meant so much to me last year. As a
princess, I—

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, Princess did amazing last year! Although
she's not as refined as her name might imply.

text_block_list.name: Chestnut-haired Umamusume's Fan
text_block_list.text: Sigh... There she goes babbling about princesses again. That's quite an ego—does she want to hog the spotlight for herself?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
The word "princess" brings to mind many different
qualities. There's beauty, nobility, candor, and so
much more.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: So when each of us say "princess," I think we all have different things in mind. And that's okay. They shouldn't be the same.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Certainly, these differences may sometimes lead
us to hurt one another...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But even so, I want to become the princess I
envision for myself.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I have a lot of regrets, but also a lot to be proud
of. That's why...

text_block_list.name: Girl with Braids
text_block_list.text: ...Kawakami Princess?

text_block_list.name: Suntanned Boy
text_block_list.text: Don't cry!

text_block_list.name: Suntanned Boy
text_block_list.text:
To me, you're the coolest princess there is! I want
to become a princess like you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A commotion begins to stir within the audience.
The crowd separates, forming a circle around a
young boy... and a woman.

text_block_list.name: Lady in a Dress
text_block_list.text:
Ken?! Don't tell me you still harbor that foolish
desire to become a princess...

text_block_list.name: Suntanned Boy
text_block_list.text:
Mother... I know you told me it was impossible
and that I should give up the thought...

text_block_list.name: Suntanned Boy
text_block_list.text:
But I can't change how I feel! I want to be a
princess!

text_block_list.name: Suntanned Boy
text_block_list.text:
I want to be just like Kawakami Princess! A cool,
strong, dazzling princess!

text_block_list.name: Lady in a Dress
text_block_list.text:
At the very least, surely you should aim to be a
prince instead! I mean, you're a...
choice_data_list:
What do you say to that, Kawakami Princess? Is
that true?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
No, it isn't! Whether or not he can become a
princess all depends on his mindset and effort!

text_block_list.name: Lady in a Dress
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I believe that a princess is someone who never
gives up. And how one becomes that princess is
different for everyone!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Just as my vision differs from yours, I'm sure the
boy has his own idea of what being a princess
entails.
choice_data_list: There's no right or wrong here.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Indeed. It's not our place to tell others what to believe. That's for them to decide. Instead, focus on who you want to be.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That way, when you look back on your past, you'll
feel proud.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Proud of the fact... that you did it all yourself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, I hear the sound of footsteps
approaching...

text_block_list.name: Chestnut-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I... think that she's right.

text_block_list.name: Chestnut-haired Umamusume's Fan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Y-you're...

text_block_list.name: Chestnut-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I won't pretend it doesn't bug me when she talks
about princesses in events and interviews, but
that's my problem, not hers. She's her own person,
and so am I!

text_block_list.name: Chestnut-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
To tell the truth, I think you're amazing! But I
believe that my own dream is even more
incredible.

text_block_list.name: Chestnut-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
That's why I won't lose our next race! When we
compete, let's see which of us has grown more!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Gladly. I'll take you head-on in any race!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Daaang... The older racers are so cool!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Talk about nerves. I feel like my whole body tensed up.
choice_data_list: But you stayed true to your ideal of a princess.
But you stayed true to your ideal of a princess.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: You're right, and I won't lose sight of it again.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I can't be ignorant of the hurt I may cause others,
but I won't be afraid. I'll continue down the path
I've chosen.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
In order to become the princess I aspire to be...
I'll conduct myself in a manner I can be proud of.
choice_data_list:
I'm sure you'll become a role model for others,
too.

I'm sure you'll become a role model for others,
too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as Princess Fighter inspired Kawakami
Princess, I'm sure she will go on to inspire others.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hehe... I hope you're right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grrrowl...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Ack.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, come on... Why now?! How's anyone
supposed to take me seriously if my stomach
growls like a lion?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though Kawakami Princess laments her growling
stomach, I'm only too happy to take her around
to the different food stalls to show my
appreciation for her effort and growth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, I hear the sound of footsteps
approaching...

text_block_list.name: Girl with Braids
text_block_list.text: Kawakami Princess, you were so cool up there!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Awww, are you enjoying the festival? They even
have a punching tournament over there, you
know? ♪

text_block_list.name: Girl with Braids
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, really?! ...I mean, Ken, you talked to your
mom, right?

text_block_list.name: Suntanned Boy
text_block_list.text: Shut uuup... Anyway, my mom already said sorry.

text_block_list.name: Suntanned Boy
text_block_list.text:
She apologized to me and gave me a pat on the
head. So...

text_block_list.name: Suntanned Boy
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Princess! Later!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Braids
text_block_list.text: Ah, wait! Ken!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Oh my.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure the two of them will become wonderful
princesses one day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In that moment, I take a glance at Kawakami
Princess and see the eyes of a wonderful, bona
fide princess.
